memoryArtifacts.headline: Find a Grave
memoryArtifacts.description:
Knight of the Body to King Edward IV.
Second son of Sir James Berkeley and his third wife, Isabel Mowbray, grandson of Sir James Berkeley and Elizabeth Bluet, Sir Thomas Mowbray and Elizabeth Arundel. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley於1436年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，他的父親Sir James Berkeley42歲，母親Isabelle de Mowbray40歲。他於1465年與Isabel Meade在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1506年9月在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年70歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley于1436年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，他的父亲Sir James Berkeley42岁，母亲Isabelle de Mowbray40岁。他于1465年与Isabel Meade在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1506年9月在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年70岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Maurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Mauricius, a derivative of Maurus (a byname meaning ‘Moor’, i.e. ‘dark, swarthy’), borne by, among others, an early Byzantine emperor ( c.539–602 ). It was introduced to Britain by the Normans and was popular in the Middle English period, but was not widely adopted by the nobility and became rare in the 17th century. Between the mid-19th century and the 1940s, it was moderately popular but has since faded again. See also Morris .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley was born in 1436, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James Berkeley, was 42 and his mother, Isabelle de Mowbray, was 40. He married Isabel Meade in 1465, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in September 1506, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley est né en 1436, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James Berkeley, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Mowbray, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Meade en 1465, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1506, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley 1436 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Berkeley 42 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Mowbray 40. Er hat 1465 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England Isabel Meade geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im September 1506 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley è nato il nel 1436 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James Berkeley, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Mowbray, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Meade nel 1465, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1506, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeleyが1436年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir James Berkeleyは42歳，母Isabelle de Mowbrayは40歳であった。1465年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでIsabel Meadeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1506年9月にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで70歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Berkeley(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Mowbray(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 Isabel Meade(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1506년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley nasceu em 1436, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James Berkeley, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Mowbray, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Meade em 1465, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1506, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley родился в 1436 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James Berkeley было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Mowbray, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Meade в 1465 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1506 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley nació en 1436, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James Berkeley, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Mowbray, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Isabel Meade en 1465, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1506, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
